title: Fermented Fluffy Plum Monsoon Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring fermented plum sauce as the star ingredient, served over fluffy dumplings in a monsoon-inspired blend of spices.

ingredients.name: Plum Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use fermented plum sauce for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Dumplings
ingredients.notes: Preferably fresh or frozen dumplings, egg-free if needed

ingredients.name: Shallots
ingredients.notes: Minced for added crunch and aroma

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For frying dumplings and sautéing shallots

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: To taste, for seasoning the sauce

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add minced shallots and sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant and lightly golden.
Stir in plum sauce, salt, pepper, and chili flakes. Mix well.
Gently fold in dumplings using tongs to ensure they don't break.
Sauté the dumplings until they are heated through and slightly crispy on the outside.
Serve hot with additional green onions for garnish.
